recommendations.title: 20 Days in Mariupol
recommendations.overview: As the Russian invasion begins, a team of Ukrainian journalists trapped in the besieged city of Mariupol struggle to continue their work documenting the war's atrocities.

recommendations.title: The Look of Silence
recommendations.overview: An optician grapples with the Indonesian mass killings of 1965-1966, during which his older brother was exterminated.

recommendations.title: The Act of Killing
recommendations.overview: In this chilling and groundbreaking documentary, former Indonesian death squad leaders reenact their real-life mass killings in the style of various film genres. As they recreate their past atrocities, the line between reality and performance blurs,

recommendations.title: Secrets of the Saqqara Tomb
recommendations.overview: This documentary follows a team of local archaeologists excavating never before explored passageways, shafts, and tombs, piecing together the secrets of Egypt’s most significant find in almost 50 years in Saqqara.

recommendations.title: ariana grande: excuse me, i love you
recommendations.overview: Ariana Grande takes the stage in London for her Sweetener World Tour and shares a behind-the-scenes look at her life in rehearsal and on the road.

recommendations.title: Indie Game: The Movie
recommendations.overview: Follows the dramatic journeys of video game developers as they create and release their games to the world. It's about making video games, but at its core, it's about the creative process, and exposing yourself through your work.

recommendations.title: Batman Begins
recommendations.overview: Driven by tragedy, billionaire Bruce Wayne dedicates his life to uncovering and defeating the corruption that plagues his home, Gotham City.  Unable to work within the system, he instead creates a new identity, a symbol of fear for the criminal under

recommendations.title: Bobby Fischer Against the World
recommendations.overview: The first documentary feature to explore the tragic and bizarre life of the late chess master Bobby Fischer.

recommendations.title: Slugs
recommendations.overview: People are dying mysteriously and gruesomely, and nobody has a clue what the cause is. Only health worker Mike Brady has a possible solution, but his theory of killer slugs is laughed at by the authorities. Only when the body count begins to rise and

recommendations.title: The Bridge
